title: JWT Authentication in MERN Stack
description: Complete beginner to advanced guide for JWT authentication.

body.raw:
# JWT Authentication in MERN Stack

JWT authentication is one of the most important concepts in full-stack applications.

## Why JWT?

- Stateless
- Scalable
- Secure
